name: District of Columbia DLCP Business License Verification

agency.name: District of Columbia Department of Licensing and Consumer Protection

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against SCOUT and DLCP online resources before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: business license records exposed by SCOUT that may include contractor-related license categories
knownExclusions: SCOUT spans business, property, permit, and licensing information; this source entry is not a contractor-only export.
Occupational and professional licenses, permits, local enforcement records, and business registrations may require separate source entries or filters.
Contractor category semantics must be reviewed before any adapter treats rows as construction-license records.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Prefer official APIs or exports if discovered; do not bypass login walls, CAPTCHAs, or technical controls.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, permit, registration, or authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official contractor-specific bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for DC DLCP business license verification. Future work should decide whether contractor-related license categories need a dedicated adapter or separate source entries.
maintainerNotes: Keep broad business-license scope explicit and avoid treating every SCOUT record as a contractor license.
